name: Suede Skills MCP
summary: Local MCP access to Suede design, copywriting, SEO/AEO/AI EO, visibility grading, code grading, Suedify site mimicry, agent-team loops, install, QA, artist campaign, and creator utility context.

publicLinks.label: GitHub Pages site
publicLinks.description: Public landing page for Suede Creator Skills, install paths, docs, and stampable linkset.

publicLinks.label: Ambassador explainer
publicLinks.description: Long-form Markdown guide for ambassadors explaining Suedify, public skills, MCP, SEO/AEO/AI EO audits, QA, social posts, emails, FAQ, and claim boundaries.

publicLinks.label: Copy bank
publicLinks.description: Public copy bank for GitHub, docs, CTA, SEO/AEO/AI EO, FAQ, social, and safety copy.

publicLinks.label: Public installs and MCP
publicLinks.description: Public GitHub skill install commands and Suede Skills MCP guidance.

publicLinks.label: Develop with Suede
publicLinks.description: CTA for people who want Suede to turn a site, campaign, app surface, or design system into a more polished public workflow.

plugins.name: suede-workflow-skills
plugins.description: Public Suede workflow skills for design, copywriting, SEO/AEO/AI EO, visibility grading, code grading, Suedify reference-site restyling, code review, agent-team loops, launch packaging, install support, claim checks, site polish, artist campaign tools, and creator utilities.

plugins.name: suede-creator-skills
plugins.description: Public artist and creator skills for eras, song worlds, hooks, stunts, fan rituals, visualizers, merch objects, setlists, catalog revival, campaigns, neutral sync review packaging, release linting, rights passports, and provenance support.
plugins.publicInstall: python3 ~/.codex/skills/.system/skill-installer/scripts/install-skill-from-github.py --repo JasonColapietro/suede-creator-skills --path skills/suede-era-builder skills/suede-song-to-universe skills/suede-hook-hunter skills/suede-release-stunt-lab skills/suede-fan-rituals skills/suede-visualizer-director skills/suede-merch-object-lab skills/suede-setlist-theater skills/suede-catalog-resurrection skills/suede-artist-identity-forge skills/suede-collab-matchmaker skills/suede-campaign-in-a-box skills/suede-sync-packaging skills/music-release-metadata-linter skills/suede-rights-passport skills/suede-rights-audit skills/suede-provenance-map skills/suede-licensing-prep skills/suede-royalty-routing-brief

skills.name: suede-workflow-skills
skills.description: Public umbrella Suede workflow for design, copywriting, SEO/AEO/AI EO, visibility grading, code grading, Suedify site restyling, code review, agent-team loops, install support, MCP QA, artist campaign tools, creator utilities, and public launch packaging.
skills.useWhen: Use when a user wants the full Suede workflow pack loaded from one public GitHub skill path.

skills.name: suedify
skills.description: Two-URL website restyling workflow that studies a reference URL and transforms a target URL with Suede-safe design fidelity.
skills.useWhen: Use when asked to mimic, restyle, or make one website feel like another reference site while preserving brand and legal safety.

skills.name: suede-design
skills.description: Suede frontend design, redesign, UI polish, visual audit, design-system, responsive QA, and implementation handoff workflow.
skills.useWhen: Use for Suede websites, app surfaces, dashboards, campaign pages, onboarding, empty states, forms, components, tokens, typography, layout, motion, imagery, public copy, or design-related frontend changes.

skills.name: suede-copy
skills.description: Suede conversion copy, public docs copy, GitHub README copy, SEO/AEO/AI EO snippets, CTAs, launch copy, line editing, and full SEO/AEO/AI EO copy audit workflow.
skills.useWhen: Use for Suede website text, skill pages, public docs, GitHub Pages copy, README sections, metadata, headings, subheads, buttons, FAQ answers, launch notes, or SEO/AEO/AI EO copy audits.

skills.name: suede-brand-voice
skills.description: Suede brand voice workflow for public copy, README prose, docs, CTAs, FAQs, social copy, launch language, skill descriptions, and ambassador text.
skills.useWhen: Use when copy should sound specific, creator-owned, rights-aware, agent-commerce-aware, polished, and free of generic AI phrasing.

skills.name: suede-seo-audit
skills.description: Suede SEO, AEO, AI EO, visibility grading, metadata, schema, internal-link, crawlability, search-intent, answer-intent, and public docs audit workflow.
skills.useWhen: Use when auditing Suede pages, GitHub Pages sites, README files, skill docs, launch pages, copy banks, install pages, sitemap entries, AI result surfaces, or public surfaces.

skills.name: suede-visibility-grader
skills.description: Suede website visibility and CTA grading workflow for public pages, GitHub Pages sites, launch pages, docs, and campaign pages with A-F grades for findability, first-screen clarity, CTA pull, proof, AI readability, and design signal.
skills.useWhen: Use when a user wants to know whether a page can be found, understood, trusted, cited by AI systems, and acted on.

skills.name: suede-site-alchemy
skills.description: Suede website, landing page, campaign page, SEO/AEO/AI EO, visibility grading, CTA routing, conversion, and page polish workflow.
skills.useWhen: Use for improving pages, packaging Suede Sites-style website growth offers, or routing app requests into Suede app-builder workflow.

skills.name: suede-code-grader
skills.description: Suede direct A-F code grading workflow for diffs, PRs, branches, MCP servers, plugins, APIs, app surfaces, public-site changes, and release candidates with lane scores and an explanation why.
skills.useWhen: Use when a user wants a code grade from A-F, the reason for that grade, required upgrades, and a ship gate without a full review report.

skills.name: suede-code-review
skills.description: Suede full-context code review, PR review, release gate, A-F code grading, security sweep, architecture critique, regression hunt, and fix brief workflow.
skills.useWhen: Use for production behavior, auth, payments, rights/provenance, registry systems, royalty routing, agent commerce, dashboards, APIs, public claims, shared components, or multi-repo contracts.

skills.name: suede-agent-teams
skills.description: Suede agent team orchestration for scout, safe parallel build, adversarial review, consensus review, design visibility review, A-F code grading, WIP protection, release lock, recovery, and evidence handoff loops.
skills.useWhen: Use when a Suede task is large, risky, cross-surface, multi-repo, release-bound, design-heavy, or benefits from coordinated lanes with clear ownership.

skills.name: suede-launch-packaging
skills.description: Suede launch packaging workflow for public releases, GitHub Pages updates, README launches, skill-pack releases, docs launches, social/email copy, proof links, install commands, QA, and handoff notes.
skills.useWhen: Use when preparing a Suede skill, repo, site, MCP server, feature, or public docs update to be shared.

skills.name: suede-install-support
skills.description: Suede public install support for Codex skills, Claude skills, GitHub skill folders, MCP setup, local plugin notes, installer command QA, and ambassador-safe install instructions.
skills.useWhen: Use when install commands fail, public users cannot add a skill, @personal appears in public copy, or docs need a simpler install path.

skills.name: suede-mcp-qa
skills.description: Suede MCP server QA workflow for stdio JSON-RPC tools, resources, prompts, catalog output, install options, SEO/AEO/AI EO audit scaffolds, QA checklists, protocol errors, and docs alignment.
skills.useWhen: Use when building, changing, testing, or explaining the Suede Skills MCP.

skills.name: suede-ambassador-explainer
skills.description: Suede ambassador explanation workflow for public talk tracks, DMs, posts, emails, FAQs, onboarding copy, skill-pack explanations, install guidance, objection handling, and claim-safe routing.
skills.useWhen: Use when writing language for ambassadors who need to explain Suede skills, workflows, MCP, Suedify, design, copywriting, SEO/AEO/AI EO, artist campaign tools, creator utilities, or public install paths.

skills.name: suede-public-claim-check
skills.description: Suede public claim check workflow for copy, docs, READMEs, launch pages, skill descriptions, ambassador language, social posts, emails, metadata, and MCP output.
skills.useWhen: Use when public wording may imply unsupported traction, legal clearance, payouts, registry writes, private access, guaranteed outcomes, or misleading install availability.

skills.name: suede-agent-commerce
skills.description: Suede agent commerce preparation workflow for making creative works, skill packs, docs, rights packages, licensing notes, install commands, and public metadata readable to agents.
skills.useWhen: Use when a Suede asset should be easier for AI agents to inspect, route, license, recommend, transact around, or QA safely.

skills.name: suede-era-builder
skills.description: Build an artist era with visual language, symbols, fan rituals, content rules, rollout tone, rights awareness, and Suede-safe campaign CTAs.
skills.useWhen: Use when a musician wants a song, EP, album, or campaign to become a recognizable world.

skills.name: suede-song-to-universe
skills.description: Expand one song into story scenes, imagery, captions, fan prompts, merch objects, drop mechanics, and campaign ideas.
skills.useWhen: Use when a track needs a creative universe around it.

skills.name: suede-hook-hunter
skills.description: Find the 5 to 15 second lyrical, visual, emotional, and fan-participation hooks that can travel across short-form platforms.
skills.useWhen: Use when an artist needs the clip, caption, chant, teaser, or trailer moment people repeat.

skills.name: suede-release-stunt-lab
skills.description: Design public-safe release stunts, fan missions, clues, timed drops, unlocks, collector actions, and campaign surprises.
skills.useWhen: Use when a release needs a memorable moment beyond an announcement post.

skills.name: suede-fan-rituals
skills.description: Create repeatable fan behaviors such as phrases, comments, gestures, unlock actions, live moments, and stampable participation tasks.
skills.useWhen: Use when an artist wants fans to do something recognizable together.

skills.name: suede-visualizer-director
skills.description: Create treatments for visualizers, lyric videos, canvas loops, stage screens, cover motion, teaser edits, and AI video prompts.
skills.useWhen: Use when a song needs visual direction that matches its world.

skills.name: suede-merch-object-lab
skills.description: Turn lyrics, lore, symbols, inside jokes, and visual codes into merch objects, bundles, collector items, and drop mechanics.
skills.useWhen: Use when merch should feel like an artifact from the artist world, not a generic logo item.

skills.name: suede-setlist-theater
skills.description: Design live set arcs, transitions, crowd moments, visual cues, talk breaks, encore moves, and post-show actions.
skills.useWhen: Use when a performance should feel staged, memorable, and tied to the release world.

skills.name: suede-catalog-resurrection
skills.description: Turn dormant songs, demos, stems, alternate takes, covers, live clips, and old assets into new campaigns, fan drops, or catalog revival packages.
skills.useWhen: Use when an artist wants old catalog to move again.

skills.name: suede-artist-identity-forge
skills.description: Sharpen artist identity across voice, visuals, lore, values, audience promise, symbols, anti-references, and public positioning.
skills.useWhen: Use before bios, websites, visuals, release rollouts, or campaigns when the artist identity is still fuzzy.

skills.name: suede-collab-matchmaker
skills.description: Design collaboration lanes with producers, remixers, visual artists, venues, brands, creators, and campaign partners.
skills.useWhen: Use when an artist wants stronger collaboration angles than obvious feature requests.

skills.name: suede-campaign-in-a-box
skills.description: Package a complete artist rollout with announce copy, teaser sequence, release-week plan, fan actions, email, site sections, and press angles.
skills.useWhen: Use when a musician wants the whole rollout turned into usable moves.

skills.name: suede-sync-packaging
skills.description: Prepare tracks for sync-style review with scene-fit angles, one-sheet copy, clean and instrumental asset needs, lyric flags, mood tags, rights gaps, and safe pitch copy.
skills.useWhen: Use when a song or catalog asset should be organized for film, TV, ads, games, trailers, creator campaigns, or brand briefs without claiming clearance.

skills.name: music-release-metadata-linter
skills.description: Audit music, audio, video, artwork, and creative release folders for metadata, rights, split, file, and Suede intake gaps.
skills.useWhen: Use before release, licensing, registry preparation, royalty routing, agent commerce, or Suede transfer.

skills.name: suede-rights-passport
skills.description: Prepare creator folders for Suede intake with provenance, rights, credits, splits, licenses, media optimization notes, and missing-info reports.
skills.useWhen: Use when packaging a project into a Suede-ready transfer package.

skills.name: suede-rights-audit
skills.description: Suede creator-rights audit workflow for ownership claims, contributors, credits, royalty splits, sample status, license notes, release history, public URLs, metadata gaps, and provenance gaps.
skills.useWhen: Use before rights passporting, licensing prep, registry readiness, royalty routing, or Suede creator intake.

skills.name: suede-provenance-map
skills.description: Suede provenance mapping workflow for source files, stems, masters, artwork, lyrics, documents, metadata, public URLs, hashes, evidence trails, unknown origins, and review notes.
skills.useWhen: Use when mapping where a creative work came from before rights passporting, licensing review, registry prep, or agent commerce.

skills.name: suede-licensing-prep
skills.description: Suede licensing preparation workflow for music, media, rights notes, sample status, contributor approvals, public URLs, sync/licensing readiness, restrictions, clearance gaps, and safe outreach materials.
skills.useWhen: Use when a creator project needs to be organized for licensing discussion, sync review, brand use, or partner review without claiming clearance.

skills.name: suede-royalty-routing-brief
skills.description: Suede royalty routing brief workflow for split readiness, contributor payment roles, royalty destinations, payout caveats, missing confirmations, data needed for routing, and public-safe royalty language.
skills.useWhen: Use when preparing creator projects for royalty routing discussion, intake review, or agent-readable rights packaging.
